name: @clearline/data-access-billing
description: Billing & Plan data-access layer for clearline-web (EPIC-CW-022 / US-CW-042): React Query hooks over /api/billing for the plan/usage summary, Stripe-hosted payment-method update, invoice download, and type-the-company-name cancellation, plus the any-role read-only grace status. No UI, no business rules.

metadata.scope: Data-access lib for EPIC-CW-022 (US-CW-042 Billing & Plan).
